title: Vibrant German Bread Grill
description: A yeasty, coconut milk infused German bread grilled to a crisp, with a gooey center, perfect for an energizing breakfast or snack.
instructions: In a large bowl combine flour, yeast, salt, and sugar.
Add warm coconut milk, warm water, and olive oil; mix until a sticky dough forms.
Knead the dough on a floured surface for about 8 minutes until smooth and elastic.
Place the dough in a lightly oiled bowl, cover, and let rise in a warm spot for 1 hour until doubled in size.
Punch down the dough, divide it into four equal portions, and shape each into a flat oval.
Preheat a robata grill to medium-high heat and lightly oil the grill grate.
Place the dough ovals on the grill, covering with a lid, and cook for 4-5 minutes per side until golden brown and a crackling sound is heard.
Brush each grilled bread with melted butter, sprinkle sesame seeds and dill, and finish grilling for an additional minute.
Remove from the grill, slice into thick wedges, and serve warm for an energizing breakfast.
Optionally, drizzle a light coconut cream over the wedges to enhance gooeyness.
